enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night/early-morning vlog at 4:35am from Boulder, giving a scattered update on his day and plans. He mentions working on a 'migratory civil page' website project, wanting to fill an SD card with MP3 files, and an idea to record Kindle audiobooks through speakers to convert them into a free, shareable audio collection. He also mentions intending to do a video about a diagnosis.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: loves the ease of recording and uploading directly to YouTube
frustrated that Amazon restricts audiobook conversion, sees it as a problem worth working around
finds it unreliable and annoying — stops frequently, sometimes only plays for 30 seconds
